items.title: George Kittle links lingering Brandon Aiyuk issues to his 2024 contract negotiations
items.summary: When 49ers tight end George Kittle last addressed receiver Brandon Aiyuk, during a visit with Pardon My Take, he told Commanders fan PFT Commenter, "Have fun with that."
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Guardiola turns down Italy manager job
items.summary: Former Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola turns down the chance to coach Italy.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Ambitious Yorkshire strengthen with Arlott signing
items.summary: Yorkshire sign England bowler Em Arlott from Warwickshire on a three-year-contract, starting next season.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
